query:
ALTER TABLE lessons 
ADD COLUMN cancelledAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN cancelledBy ENUM('student', 'coach', 'system') NULL,
ADD COLUMN cancellationReason TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN refundAmountCents INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN refundProcessedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN cancellationToken VARCHAR(64) NULL;
